mapper.insert: INSERT INTO supply_claim_order(id, user_id, applicant_name, status, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{applicantName}, #{status}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM supply_claim_order WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM supply_claim_order WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM supply_claim_order WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE supply_claim_order SET status = 'FULFILLED', fulfilled_at = #{fulfilledAt}, fulfilled_by = #{fulfilledBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PENDING' AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM supply_claim_order WHERE status = 'PENDING' AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM supply_claim_order WHERE status = 'PENDING' AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM supply_claim_order WHERE status = 'PENDING' AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM supply_claim_order WHERE status = 'PENDING' AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM supply_claim_order WHERE status IN ('FULFILLED', 'WITHDRAWN') AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY COALESCE(fulfilled_at, created_at) DESC, created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM supply_claim_order WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status IN ('FULFILLED', 'WITHDRAWN') AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY COALESCE(fulfilled_at, created_at) DESC, created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE supply_claim_order SET deleted = 1, deleted_time = NOW(), deleted_by = #{operatorId}, purge_after_time = #{purgeAfter} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM supply_claim_order WHERE deleted = 1 ORDER BY deleted_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM supply_claim_order WHERE deleted = 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM supply_claim_order WHERE deleted = 1 AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE supply_claim_order SET deleted = 0, deleted_time = NULL, deleted_by = NULL, purge_after_time = NULL WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 1
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM supply_claim_order WHERE deleted = 0 AND user_id IS NOT NULL AND user_id <> '' ORDER BY user_id
